query: SELECT chaveJ, mes, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CAST(valorLiquido AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_liquido FROM consignados WHERE chaveJ LIKE '%JH299827%' GROUP BY chaveJ, mes ORDER BY mes DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user axRHbWZqKReZrAb.b2cf85c9ad94 --database SMgJn6AGQCNfDq7mPzPqc9 --execute SELECT chaveJ, mes, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CAST(valorLiquido AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_liquido FROM consignados WHERE chaveJ LIKE '%JH299827%' GROUP BY chaveJ, mes ORDER BY mes DESC LIMIT 10;
